veerVikram.name: Veer Vikram
veerVikram.blockDescription: Cannot be affected by other characters

kaluDakayt.name: Kalu Dakayt
kaluDakayt.description: Take 2 coins from a target player

petukchandra.name: Petukchandra
petukchandra.description: Draw 2 cards from deck, return 2 cards

jinnerBadshah.name: Jinn's King
jinnerBadshah.description: Take 1 coin and place Jinn Token

mamdoHomdho.name: Mamdo-Homdho
mamdoHomdho.description: Take 8 coins from bank. Pay 1 to each player who also claims Mamdo

putuulRaj.name: Puppet King
putuulRaj.description: Place 2 puppet tokens - one for yourself, one for another player
putuulRaj.blockDescription: Linked players cannot target each other

bokhdoity.name: Bokhdoity
bokhdoity.description: Give target 3 coins and they lose 1 card

chichkeChhor.name: Chichke Chor
chichkeChhor.description: All other players give you 1 coin each

arun.name: Arun
arun.description: Look at cards from deck. Pay 1 coin per additional card viewed

nantuMiya.name: Nantu Miya
nantuMiya.description: Place 2 tax tokens. Players using that character pay you 1 coin

betalPrataraj.name: Betel Prataraj
betalPrataraj.description: Target pays 2 coins or you pay 5 and remove 1 card
